creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
Thanks for help and information about seq/jot difference, script modified:
 
  __indent() {
 +  [ ${1} -eq 0 ] && return
    for I in $( jot ${1} 2> /dev/null )
    do
      echo -n "  "
    done
    }
 
 Regards,
 vermaden
